notes.google_ai_api_key: Get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey — used for NanoBanana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image)
notes.google_service_account_path: Path to your Google service account JSON file. Create at https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/serviceaccounts. Enable Sheets API + Drive API. Share your target sheet with the service account email.
notes.default_sheet_id: The ID from your Google Sheet URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/{THIS_PART}/edit
